lane_title: ComfyUI Troubleshooting, Migration, and Packaging Safety
title: custom-node-binary-search
summary: Disable all custom nodes, verify default workflow, then binary-search frontend extensions and node packs.
use_when: How do I find which ComfyUI custom node is breaking my install?
chunking_hint: Retrieve canonical overview and official source anchors with this card. Keep code examples intact.

lane_title: ComfyUI Troubleshooting, Migration, and Packaging Safety
title: frontend-vs-backend-error
summary: Blank UI/misaligned widgets suggests frontend; import/pip/torch errors suggest backend/dependencies.
use_when: How do I tell frontend extension problems from backend dependency problems?
chunking_hint: Retrieve canonical overview and official source anchors with this card. Keep code examples intact.

lane_title: ComfyUI Troubleshooting, Migration, and Packaging Safety
title: dependency-conflicts
summary: Different packs pin incompatible torch, xformers, onnxruntime, opencv, or other wheels.
use_when: Why do ComfyUI custom nodes create dependency conflicts?
chunking_hint: Retrieve canonical overview and official source anchors with this card. Keep code examples intact.

lane_title: ComfyUI Troubleshooting, Migration, and Packaging Safety
title: workflow-red-nodes
summary: Missing custom node pack, renamed class_type, disabled node, incompatible version, or failed import.
use_when: What causes red/missing nodes in ComfyUI workflows?
chunking_hint: Retrieve canonical overview and official source anchors with this card. Keep code examples intact.

lane_title: ComfyUI Troubleshooting, Migration, and Packaging Safety
title: node-replacement
summary: Use Node Replacement API or documented migration path; otherwise provide mapping table and workflow patch.

lane_title: ComfyUI Troubleshooting, Migration, and Packaging Safety
title: packaging-checklist
summary: README, requirements, __init__, mappings, example_workflows, optional subgraphs, license, changelog, and smoke test.
use_when: What should a ComfyUI custom node pack include?
chunking_hint: Retrieve canonical overview and official source anchors with this card. Keep code examples intact.

lane_title: ComfyUI Troubleshooting, Migration, and Packaging Safety
title: model-path-diagnostics
summary: Check expected folder, extra_model_paths, filename in dropdown, permissions, and model type-specific loader.
use_when: How do I debug missing model files in ComfyUI?
chunking_hint: Retrieve canonical overview and official source anchors with this card. Keep code examples intact.

lane_title: ComfyUI Troubleshooting, Migration, and Packaging Safety
title: safe-update-policy
summary: Backup workflow and env, update ComfyUI and nodes together, smoke-test default workflow, then advanced workflows.
use_when: How should users update ComfyUI/custom nodes safely?
chunking_hint: Retrieve canonical overview and official source anchors with this card. Keep code examples intact.

lane_title: ComfyUI Troubleshooting, Migration, and Packaging Safety
title: log-reporting
summary: ComfyUI console log, workflow JSON/PNG, node pack list, model paths, Python/torch/CUDA info, and exact error.
use_when: What should an AI ask for when diagnosing ComfyUI?
chunking_hint: Retrieve canonical overview and official source anchors with this card. Keep code examples intact.

lane_title: ComfyUI Troubleshooting, Migration, and Packaging Safety
title: one-click-installer
summary: Dry-run checks, isolated venv, conflict detection, reversible changes, clear logs, and model-path prompts.
use_when: What makes a ComfyUI one-click installer safe?
